id: finish-beta-distribution-on-testing-group

description: "Finish the beta distribution testing of the release candidate on the given group."

api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Stop beta distribution on the testing group - IOS only"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/app-versions/{id}/beta-distribution/testing-groups/{group_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Finish the beta distribution testing of the release candidate on the given group.
